```shellscript
            benchmark.execution.max_concurrent=$MAX_CONCURRENT \
            benchmark.execution.pass_at_k=$PASS_AT_K \
            benchmark.data.data_dir=/mnt/shared-storage-user/songdemin/user/suqisheng/MiroThinker/data/hle-text-500 \

```
我想在上面的日志输出名字上加上时间信息

你可以在日志文件名中添加时间戳。以下是几种方案：

## 方案 1：使用 `date` 命令（推荐）

```shellscript
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
uv run python benchmarks/common_benchmark.py \
    benchmark=$BENCHMARK_NAME \
    benchmark.data.metadata_file="standardized_data_original.jsonl" \
    llm=qwen-3 \
    llm.provider=$LLM_PROVIDER \
    llm.model_name=$LLM_MODEL \
    llm.base_url=$BASE_URL \
    llm.async_client=$async_client \
    llm.temperature=$TEMPERATURE \
    llm.max_context_length=$MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH \
    llm.api_key=$API_KEY \
    benchmark.execution.max_tasks=null \
    benchmark.execution.max_concurrent=$MAX_CONCURRENT \
    benchmark.execution.pass_at_k=$PASS_AT_K \
    benchmark.data.data_dir=/mnt/shared-storage-user/songdemin/user/suqisheng/MiroThinker/data/hle-text-500 \
    agent=$AGENT_SET \
    hydra.run.dir=${RESULTS_DIR}/$RUN_ID \
    2>&1 | tee "$RESULTS_DIR/${RUN_ID}_${TIMESTAMP}_output.log"
```

## 方案 2：直接在文件名中嵌入

```shellscript
uv run python benchmarks/common_benchmark.py \
    ... \
    2>&1 | tee "$RESULTS_DIR/${RUN_ID}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)_output.log"
```

## 方案 3：不同的时间格式

```shellscript
# 格式：20240115_143025
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

# 格式：2024-01-15_14-30-25
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S)

# 格式：20240115-143025
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)

# 使用 Unix 时间戳
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%s)
```

## 推荐的完整示例

```shellscript
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
LOG_FILE="$RESULTS_DIR/${RUN_ID}_${TIMESTAMP}_output.log"

uv run python benchmarks/common_benchmark.py \
    benchmark=$BENCHMARK_NAME \
    benchmark.data.metadata_file="standardized_data_original.jsonl" \
    llm=qwen-3 \
    llm.provider=$LLM_PROVIDER \
    llm.model_name=$LLM_MODEL \
    llm.base_url=$BASE_URL \
    llm.async_client=$async_client \
    llm.temperature=$TEMPERATURE \
    llm.max_context_length=$MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH \
    llm.api_key=$API_KEY \
    benchmark.execution.max_tasks=null \
    benchmark.execution.max_concurrent=$MAX_CONCURRENT \
    benchmark.execution.pass_at_k=$PASS_AT_K \
    benchmark.data.data_dir=/mnt/shared-storage-user/songdemin/user/suqisheng/MiroThinker/data/hle-text-500 \
    agent=$AGENT_SET \
    hydra.run.dir=${RESULTS_DIR}/$RUN_ID \
    2>&1 | tee "$LOG_FILE"

echo "Log saved to: $LOG_FILE"
```

这样生成的日志文件名会类似：`my_run_20240115_143025_output.log`
